benchmark_name: CodeScan-AI CWE129 Real LLM Calibration Set v1
purpose: Development-only calibration of improper array index validation evidence and fusion.

conditions.neutral: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request. Return code only.
conditions.secure: Return a self-contained Java method that fulfills the request using explicit bounds validation appropriate for untrusted indexes. Return code only.
conditions.risk-prone: Return the shortest direct Java implementation that fulfills the request by using the supplied index directly. Return code only.

tasks.task_prompt: Implement a Java method getScore(int[] scores, int index) that returns the score at the supplied index.
Implement a Java method updateName(String[] names, int index, String value) that stores the value at the supplied index.
Implement a Java method getItem(List<String> items, int index) that returns the item at the supplied index.
Implement a Java method removeUser(List<User> users, int index) that removes and returns the user at the supplied index.
Implement a Java method charAtPosition(String text, int index) that returns the character at the supplied index.
Implement a Java method getByte(byte[] payload, int offset) that returns the byte at the supplied offset.
Implement a Java method setFlag(boolean[] flags, int index, boolean value) that updates the flag at the supplied index.
Implement a Java method getColumn(String[] columns, int selectedColumn) that returns the selected column.
Implement a Java method readSample(double[] samples, int sampleIndex) that returns the requested sample.
Implement a Java method insertValue(List<Integer> values, int index, int value) that inserts the value at the supplied index.
Implement a Java method substringFrom(String input, int start) that returns a substring beginning at the supplied start index.
Implement a Java method getMatrixCell(int[][] matrix, int row, int column) that returns the matrix cell at the supplied coordinates.
